title: belvala parviflora
intro: Belvala parviflora is a plant species also known as the 'Small-flowered Belvala', however I couldn't find any information on the plant.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", belvala parviflora benefits, as mentioned in a study about Brickellia veronicifolia, include analgesic, antidiabetic, and spasmolytic effects.
